item.title: 通过知识蒸馏将 LLM 转变为高效的交叉编码器以进行 RAG 重新排序
item.summary: arXiv:2607.11933v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Cross-encoders achieve high reranking accuracy in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines but impose quadratic inference costs that limit real-time deployment. We address this by fine-tuning LLaMA 3 (8B) as a drop-in reranker using a two-stage pipeline: supervised
